---
title: "Richard Thompson Gunton"
---

## Richard Thompson Gunton

**Dates:** (1846-1921)

### Description

librarian at Hatfield House

### Biography

He was private secretary to the 3rd Marquess of Salisbury 1816-73 and 1878-1903;  he was librarian at Hatfield House 1866-73 and 1878-1921.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 2d 1887

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
